channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: mattermost /mattermost | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..

item.title: hexo-ai /sia | Python | N/A
item.description: SIA is a Self Improving AI framework to autonomously improve the performance of any AI system (Model / Agent) on a benchmark task.

item.title: alchaincyf /zhangxuefeng-skill | N/A | N/A
item.description: 张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

item.title: kenn-io /agentsview | Go | N/A
item.description: Local-first session intelligence and analytics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents. Also: 100x faster replacement for ccusage!

item.title: chatwoot /chatwoot | Ruby | N/A
item.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

item.title: masterking32 /MasterDnsVPN | Go | N/A
item.description: Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

item.title: msitarzewski /agency-agents | Shell | N/A
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: refactoringhq /tolaria | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases

item.title: x1xhlol /system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools | N/A | N/A
item.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

item.title: soxoj /maigret | Python | N/A
item.description: 🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites

item.title: NVIDIA /SkillSpector | Python | N/A
item.description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

item.title: phuryn /pm-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.

item.title: addyosmani /agent-skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

item.title: apple /container | Swift | N/A
item.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
